overall.description: A cinematic drone shot from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing the Saint Denis harbor at sunset. The camera begins with an elevated view of the waterfront buildings and docks, descends through the wooden pier structures, then continues moving forward at water level across the harbor toward a distant shoreline, eventually approaching a small rowboat with an NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial harbor waterfront with warehouses and docks

events.description: camera begins gradual descent from elevated aerial view toward dock level

agents.ego_description: flying forward over the harbor in a smooth drone-like motion, surveying the waterfront

entered.detail: large painted sign on warehouse roof reading 'SAINT DENIS'
industrial wooden and brick warehouse structures along the waterfront
weathered wooden piers and dock platforms extending over the water
large steamship or cargo vessel docked in the harbor
calm harbor water reflecting the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high aerial view of the Saint Denis harbor at sunset. The camera moves smoothly forward over industrial warehouse buildings and wooden dock structures. The 'SAINT DENIS' sign is prominently visible on a rooftop as the camera begins a gradual descent toward the water level.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier walkway with railings and dock infrastructure

events.description: camera descends from open air into the dock structure, passing between wooden buildings
camera moves from wooden dock platform onto the water surface

agents.ego_description: descending through the wooden dock structures, moving between piers and railings toward water level

entered.detail: weathered wooden railings lining the edge of the pier walkway
tall mast of a moored sailboat visible between dock structures

segments.scene_description: The camera descends through the wooden dock infrastructure, passing between weathered buildings and railings. The lighting becomes more mixed as the camera moves under the shadow of the dock structures. The segment ends as the camera transitions from the wooden pier onto the water surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor water with distant shoreline

events.description: camera stabilizes at water level and continues smooth forward movement across the harbor

agents.ego_description: skimming low over the water surface, moving steadily toward the distant shoreline

entered.detail: dark silhouette of trees and vegetation on the opposite shore

segments.scene_description: Now at water level, the camera glides smoothly across the harbor surface toward the distant shoreline. The wooden dock structures recede behind as open water fills the frame. The sunset creates a warm golden reflection on the calm water, with the dark silhouette of distant trees marking the horizon.

events.description: small rowboat with occupant comes into view in the distance
camera slows slightly as it approaches the rowboat

agents.ego_description: approaching a small rowboat on the water, maintaining steady forward movement

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting in a small rowboat, rowing slowly across the harbor

entered.detail: small wooden rowboat floating on the water

segments.scene_description: The camera continues across the water and approaches a small wooden rowboat with an NPC occupant rowing slowly. The boat grows from a distant speck to a clearly visible vessel as the camera maintains its forward trajectory. The sunset colors reflect off the rippling water surface around the boat.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high aerial view of an industrial harbor into a serene, water-level approach toward a lone rower at sunset. It begins gliding over the rooftops of Saint Denis, passing a prominent city sign as the camera starts a gradual descent toward the waterfront. As the perspective drops, the camera weaves through the weathered wooden infrastructure of the docks, moving from open air into the mixed shadows of the pier buildings before transitioning onto the water's surface. The scene then opens up as the camera glides across the calm harbor, leaving the industrial structures behind while the lighting shifts to a warm golden glow reflecting off the ripples. Finally, the forward trajectory carries the camera across the open water toward the distant shoreline, closing in on a small wooden rowboat and its occupant silhouetted against the sunset.
